title: HardeningTomcat Finding List
description: A cleaner, typed replacement for the legacy HardeningKitty CSV finding format. A list is an object with metadata plus an array of findings.

listName.description: Human name, e.g. 'Windows Server 2022 Machine - CIS L1'

version.description: List version, independent of engine version

scope.description: Whether findings need elevation (machine) or run as the user

autoSelect.description: When false, Recon/Survey OS auto-selection skips this list; it runs only when named explicitly via -FindingList. Absent means true.

args.description: Method-specific arguments. Replaces the old overloaded MethodArgument/RegistryPath/RegistryItem/etc. columns. Each handler documents the keys it reads.

operator.description: Comparison between observed result and recommendedValue

recommendedValue.description: Target value. String or number; coerced per operator.

defaultValue.description: Value assumed when the setting is not present on the system

severity.description: Severity if the finding FAILS. Passed findings always score full marks.

level.description: CIS hardening level (1 = baseline, 2 = high-security). Optional; present on CIS-derived lists.
